title: Miro node pagination not returning all results
symptom: The Miro node only returns the first 10 results despite pagination configuration attempts.
not_this_if: Pagination is correctly configured and more than 10 results are expected
root_cause: The pagination configuration in the Miro node may be incomplete or incorrect. Specifically, the response body may not be properly referenced to access the next page of results, leading to only the first set being returned.
fix_steps: Ensure the pagination expression is set to '{{ $response.body.links.next }}'
Execute the workflow again to check for additional results
agent_instruction: Set the pagination expression to '{{ $response.body.links.next }}' in the Miro node settings.
